source_intake_record.raw_question_text: When subject to a unit step input, the closed-loop control system shown in the <image> will have a steady-state error of ______.
extraction_notes: solution is an option letter and was mapped to the corresponding choice text
image field contains an in-memory PIL image representation, not a path or URL

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'shown in the image'
problem asks about a closed-loop control system configuration, which is typically conveyed by a block diagram
multi_step: finding steady-state error for a unit step input usually requires interpreting the control-system diagram and then applying steady-state error reasoning
the task likely combines visual extraction of the loop structure with control-theory computation
multiple-choice format limits answer space, so complexity is moderate rather than very high
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a single value: '0'
choices are provided, enabling exact option-level checking
steady-state error for a specified input is a well-defined control-theory quantity

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、答案和主图像均存在，且 registry_passed=true
图像依赖度高且核心语义可由现有资产支撑，适合进入候选池
可验证性高：答案为明确数字，且有选项可用于核验
虽有基于提示词的评分风险标记，但不构成核心语义缺失或资产不可恢复问题
